definition.name: Regional transit pass pricing
definition.description: Evaluate demand, revenue, contribution, and operating profit across three customer segments.

recommendation.narrative: Increase price to USD 55.00 to maximize profit within the declared grid and constraints.

flags: Capacity constrains demand at one or more evaluated prices.
Observed demand is endpoint-clamped outside its measured price range.

metadata.disclaimer: Decision-support output only. Validate demand assumptions, cost-to-serve, market response, legal constraints, taxes, and implementation effects before use.
